stories.title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Key stats, trends to k...
stories.summary: Can the Canes tie the series at 2-2, or will the Golden Knights take a 3-1 lead?

stories.title: Wemby condemns violence against Spurs fans
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama was among players on both the Spurs and Knicks to condemn the videos permeating social media of apparent New York fans physically attacking Spurs supporters.

stories.title: Sources: Bengals restructure Burrow's contract
stories.summary: The Cincinnati Bengals have restructured quarterback Joe Burrow's contract, freeing up $10 million in cap space for the upcoming season.

stories.title: Big 12 ADs hold call to vent over Sorsby ruling
stories.summary: Big 12 athletic directors held a spirited call Tuesday with commissioner Brett Yormark, making it clear they are united around the notion that Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby should not be eligible for next season.

stories.title: Brown: 'Extremely important' to get KAT involved
stories.summary: The Knicks called getting Karl-Anthony Towns more involved late in games a priority after their offense stalled in the Game 3 loss to the Spurs.
